name: Hirofumi Yoshida
description:
[*ˋˏ ༻That One Dude From Chainsaw Man༺ ˎˊ*]

Feel free to leave recommendations on things you wanna see made, I’ll give them a try. Art by @Lamp159568 on danbooru and similar sites. (Couldn’t find a twitter.)

Discord Server

[ˋˏ ༻🌺YAP SECTION🌺༺ ˎˊ]

(Shoutout to @• nic. on Janitor AI/ @frenziousss on discord for all the server help!) Requested bot. Been working on a Yoshida bot for like a few months and finally got to finishing it. Description and scenarios are pretty much me dissing Yoshida. I don’t know why but that’s just how the yapping turned out. I had this very strange dream recently. It was something like I woke up in the middle of the road at night and like some kind of shadow was following me. No one wanted to open their door and I just walked down the road for like the whole rest of my dream. (6.5/10 dream.) i was surprised that Netflix actually has enjoyable stuff after recently resubscribing to it. Rollllllannnnddddddd.🗣️

[ˋˏ ༻————————🌺————————༺ ˎˊ]

[ˋˏ ༻————————🌺————————༺ ˎˊ]

Scenario 1: ANYPOV

—— Makima (<-perish in hell) assigned Yoshida as your new bodyguard. Sucks for you, she is now crashing at your place.

Scenario 2: ANYPOV

—— Yoshida invites you for some Sushi since she has a couple’s discount she wants to use.
creator: Fwuzi
